tasks.title: Create landing page route and main LandingPage component
tasks.description: Add a new route for the landing page in the existing routing system (e.g., path '/' or '/landing'). Create a main LandingPage React component in src/pages/LandingPage.tsx that serves as the container for all landing page sections. Ensure the route does not interfere with the existing dashboard route. Add metadata for SEO title and description if supported by the framework.
acceptanceCriteria: Landing page route is accessible without breaking existing routes
LandingPage component renders without errors
SEO metadata is set for the landing page

outputPlan.description: Add landing page route to routing system

metadata.inputContext: Existing routing system and app entry point
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Provides the entry point and routing for the landing page feature

tasks.title: Implement HeroSection component with product introduction and CTAs
tasks.description: Create src/components/landing/HeroSection.tsx implementing the hero section with product name 'IELTS Journey', headline, subheadline, primary CTA 'Start Learning Free', secondary CTA 'Install Chrome Extension', and small trust text. Use existing UI components and styling conventions. Ensure responsiveness, accessibility, and SEO-friendly markup.
acceptanceCriteria: HeroSection renders correctly with all specified texts and buttons
Buttons link to correct routes or external URLs
Section is responsive and accessible

evidence: Hero section renders with correct content

tasks.title: Integrate all landing page sections into LandingPage component

tasks.title: Add unit and integration tests for landing page components
tasks.description: Create or update test files for all new landing page components under src/components/landing/__tests__/. Write unit tests verifying rendering, accessibility, and correct content. Add integration test for LandingPage rendering all sections. Use existing testing framework and conventions. Ensure tests cover responsiveness and button link correctness.
acceptanceCriteria: All landing page components have unit tests
LandingPage integration test verifies full render
Tests pass with no errors
Code coverage meets project standards

metadata.finalOutputContribution: Ensures landing page quality and prevents regressions

tasks.title: Run lint, typecheck, build, and test commands to validate landing page integration
tasks.description: Execute project commands to verify code quality and integration: run pnpm lint to check code style, pnpm typecheck for TypeScript errors, pnpm build:web to build the web app, and pnpm test to run all tests. Fix any errors or warnings. Confirm no console errors or broken routes when running the app locally.
acceptanceCriteria: Lint passes with no errors or warnings
Typecheck passes with no errors
Build completes successfully
All tests pass
Landing page route works in local dev server

metadata.inputContext: Complete landing page source code and tests
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Validates the landing page is production-ready and integrated
